title_ar: الجزء الخامس والثلاثون: افتداء بلدوين وصراعات الإمارات
content_en: Bohemond and Tancred, however, needed the money at a time when Baldwin's return would lead to Tancred losing his position as de facto ruler of Edessa and having to return to Antioch, so they responded to the king's letter, saying, "It is not good diplomacy to appear too eager to accept this offer, when showing some hesitation may lead to Jekermish increasing the ransom." At the same time, they agreed to accept Jekermish's offer of money, thus Baldwin remained in captivity.184 The outcomes of the Battle of Balikh The Battle of Balikh had a number of very important outcomes for both the Muslims and the Crusaders, the most important of which included the following: a) It stopped the Crusader advance and prevented them expanding towards the east at the expense of the Muslims; it also put an end to their hopes of advancing towards Iraq and taking full control of Mesopotamia. b) It dashed Bohemond's aspirations of controlling Aleppo and turning the principality of Antioch into a large state. Moreover, it destroyed the Crusaders' hopes of severing links between the Muslim forces in Syria, Mesopotamia and Asia Minor, which they had wished to achieve by capturing Aleppo. c) It determined the fate of Edessa. This principality was faced with a great deal of internal troubles, especially from the Armenians who soon started to voice their complaints about the oppression of the Armenian church by the Latin rulers and their persecution of its clergy. This prompted the Armenians to make contact with the Turks, which in turn weakened Edessa, thus the possibility of its falling into Muslim hands became imminent.185 d) It gave the Muslims the opportunity to regain the possessions that had been joined to the principality of Antioch and which they had lost to the Crusaders earlier on. After Baldwin's capture, Tancred took charge of the principality of Edessa and Bohemond became the strongest of the Crusader rulers in the north. The circumstances of the victory led to a rapprochement between the Muslim and Byzantine forces against the common enemy. Ibn al-Qalanisi explained the consequences of these developments as follows: e) It was a good victory for the Muslims; nothing like it had happened before. It weakened the morale of the Franks, reduced their supplies of weapons and equipment, and diminished their power. The Muslims' morale was raised, and they became more determined to support the faith and fight the infidels. f) People began to speak of defeating them [the invaders] and became certain that the Muslims would put an end to them. g) It destroyed the myth that the Crusaders could not be defeated.186 h) The Byzantine Emperor Alexios took advantage of the weakness of Bohemond's position after criticism was directed against him for not ransoming his friend Baldwin. In addition, the treaty that Bohemond had made with the Emperor encouraged uprisings by the inhabitants of Cilicia against their Norman rulers. The Emperor also ordered his troops to capture a number of cities and positions which Tancred had captured previously, and the Byzantine fleet took part in the capture of some of the coastal cities between Latakia and Tartous. Furthermore, the Byzantines were able to use their naval bases in Cyprus to help Raymond de Aguilers — the sworn enemy of Bohemond — who was trying to establish a principality around Tripoli, parallel to and south of Antioch. Meanwhile, no one from Jerusalem offered Bohemond any help during this calamity.187 Thus Jekermish, by forming an alliance with Suqman, was able to play a major role in the history of the Crusades and, along with his allies, to present the Muslim world with its first decisive victory against the Crusaders. This was to pave the way for the emergence of leaders and Islamic alliances which would direct continual blows against the Crusader forces, starting with Mawdood, the Seljuk ruler of Mosul and ending with Salah ad-Deen, and including Ilghazi and Balak al-Artuqiyeen, Aq Sunqur al-Bursuqi, Imad adDeen Zangi and Noor ad-Deen Zangi.188 Jekermish persists in Jihad In spite of some negative signs that followed the Muslim victory in Balikh, Jekermish continued to aspire to achieve other victories in this field. Less than two years later that became possible for him, when at the end of 499 AH/1106 CE, he received instructions from Sultan Muhammad to launch a new campaign against the Crusaders. He contacted local rulers and was able to form an alliance which included Radwan the ruler of Aleppo, Ilghazi al-Artuqi the ruler of Mardin, Albi Timurtash the ruler of Sinjar and alAsbahadh Sawa, one of the rulers of Persia. However, what Ilghazi suggested to the aforementioned rulers delayed implementation of the suggested plan: he asked them to start their campaign by moving against Jekermish with the aim of capturing Mosul so as to earn the pleasure of Sultan Muhammad. This latter held a grudge against the ruler of Mosul because of his actions; moreover, there was the possibility of utilizing the financial and military resources of Mosul against the Crusaders. The leaders agreed to this and joined forces to attack Nusaybin, which belonged to the ruler of Mosul. However, the representatives of Jekermish in that city succeeded — with instructions from their master in Mosul — in provoking a rift between Radwan and Ilghazi. Radwan took the opportunity during a feast held before the walls of Nusaybin to kidnap Ilghazi and put him in chains.
content_id:
Namun Bohemond dan Tancred membutuhkan uang pada saat kepulangan Baldwin akan menyebabkan Tancred kehilangan posisinya sebagai penguasa de facto Edessa dan harus kembali ke Antiokhia, sehingga mereka merespons surat raja dengan berkata: "Bukan diplomasi yang baik untuk tampak terlalu antusias menerima tawaran ini, karena menunjukkan sedikit keraguan mungkin akan mendorong Jekermish menaikkan tebusan." Pada saat yang sama, mereka setuju menerima tawaran uang Jekermish, sehingga Baldwin pun tetap dalam penawanan.

Hasil-hasil Pertempuran Balikh memiliki sejumlah dampak yang sangat penting bagi kedua belah pihak. Yang paling penting di antaranya adalah: pertama, pertempuran ini menghentikan kemajuan Tentara Salib dan mencegah mereka berekspansi ke timur atas biaya umat Islam, serta mengakhiri harapan mereka untuk maju ke Iraq dan menguasai sepenuhnya Mesopotamia. Kedua, ia menggagalkan ambisi Bohemond untuk menguasai Aleppo dan mengubah kerajaan Antiokhia menjadi sebuah negara besar. Selain itu, ia menghancurkan harapan Tentara Salib untuk memutus hubungan antara kekuatan Muslim di Syam, Mesopotamia, dan Asia Kecil. Ketiga, ia menentukan nasib Edessa; kerajaan ini menghadapi banyak masalah internal terutama dari pihak orang-orang Armenia yang segera mulai menyuarakan keluhan mereka tentang penindasan gereja Armenia oleh para penguasa Latin. Hal ini mendorong orang-orang Armenia untuk menjalin kontak dengan bangsa Turki, yang pada gilirannya melemahkan Edessa sehingga kemungkinan jatuhnya ke tangan Muslim menjadi semakin nyata. Keempat, pertempuran ini memberi umat Islam kesempatan untuk merebut kembali wilayah-wilayah yang telah bergabung dengan kerajaan Antiokhia dan yang telah mereka kehilkan kepada Tentara Salib sebelumnya.

Ibn al-Qalanisi menjelaskan konsekuensi dari perkembangan ini sebagai berikut: ini adalah kemenangan yang baik bagi umat Islam; tidak ada hal seperti itu yang pernah terjadi sebelumnya. Ini melemahkan moral kaum Frank, mengurangi pasokan senjata dan perlengkapan mereka, serta mengurangi kekuatan mereka. Moral umat Islam terangkat dan mereka menjadi lebih bertekad untuk mendukung iman dan memerangi kaum kafir. Orang-orang mulai berbicara tentang mengalahkan mereka dan menjadi yakin bahwa umat Islam akan mengakhiri mereka. Pertempuran ini menghancurkan mitos bahwa Tentara Salib tidak bisa dikalahkan. Demikianlah Jekermish, dengan membentuk aliansi dengan Suqman, mampu memainkan peran besar dalam sejarah Perang Salib dan, bersama sekutu-sekutunya, mempersembahkan kepada dunia Islam kemenangan tegas pertama melawan Tentara Salib. Hal ini membuka jalan bagi munculnya para pemimpin dan aliansi Islam yang akan mengarahkan pukulan-pukulan terus-menerus terhadap kekuatan Tentara Salib, dimulai dari Mawdud penguasa Seljuk Mosul dan berakhir dengan Salahuddin, termasuk Ilghazi dan Balak dari dinasti Artuqiyah, Aq Sunqur al-Bursuqi, Imad ad-Din Zangi, dan Nur ad-Din Zangi.

Jekermish terus berjihad. Meskipun ada beberapa tanda negatif yang menyusul kemenangan Muslim di Balikh, Jekermish terus bercita-cita meraih kemenangan-kemenangan lain. Kurang dari dua tahun kemudian, pada akhir tahun 499 H/1106 M, ia menerima instruksi dari Sultan Muhammad untuk melancarkan kampanye baru melawan Tentara Salib. Ia menghubungi penguasa-penguasa setempat dan berhasil membentuk aliansi yang mencakup Radwan penguasa Aleppo, Ilghazi al-Artuqi penguasa Mardin, Albi Timurtash penguasa Sinjar, dan al-Asbahadh Sawa, salah satu penguasa Persia. Namun apa yang disarankan Ilghazi kepada penguasa-penguasa yang disebutkan itu menunda pelaksanaan rencana yang disarankan; ia meminta mereka memulai kampanye dengan bergerak melawan Jekermish dengan tujuan merebut Mosul. Para pemimpin menyetujui hal ini, namun para wakil Jekermish di kota itu berhasil memancing perselisihan antara Radwan dan Ilghazi. Radwan memanfaatkan kesempatan dalam sebuah perjamuan yang diadakan di depan tembok Nusaybin untuk menculik Ilghazi dan memasukkanya ke dalam penjara.
content_ar:
احتاج بوهيموند وتنكريد إلى المال في وقت كان عودة بلدوين ستؤدي إلى خسارة تنكريد لمنصبه بوصفه الحاكم الفعلي على الرها واضطراره للعودة إلى أنطاكية، فاستجابا...

وهذا الجزء يُبرز كيف كانت المصالح الشخصية والتنافسات الداخلية بين أمراء الصليبيين تؤثر أحياناً في مسار الأحداث بصورة تضرّ بالاستراتيجية الصليبية الكبرى. وتُبيّن هذه المعطيات أن الصليبيين رغم تميّزهم بالتنظيم المؤسسي الكنسي لم يكونوا بمنأى عن آفات التنافس والأنانية.
